info.summaryLine: One surface for verified impact, compensation lifecycle, and wallet-linked modules.

media.subtitle: The definitive loyalty program for people like you who protect the planet.
media.title: Alternun Impact & Reputation Score

elProyecto.sectionTitle: A regenerative economy that benefits you

airs.overview: Airs is your positive footprint on Alternun. It is bought, earned and lost based on your regenerative actions and determines your Regenerative Basic Income (RBI).
airs.subtitle: Your Regenerative Reputation
airs.title: Airs

atn.overview: ATN is the utility and governance token of the Alternun ecosystem. It allows you to participate in decisions, access premium features and reward impact actions.
atn.subtitle: Governance Token
atn.title: ATN

rbi.overview: RBI is a regenerative basic income that is automatically distributed based on your Airs score. The higher your positive impact, the higher your RBI.
rbi.subtitle: Regenerative Basic Income
rbi.title: RBI

comoFunciona.subtitle: Four simple steps to start your regenerative journey

s1.description: Sign up and connect your wallet to start your regenerative journey on Alternun.
s1.title: Connect your wallet

s2.b2: Earn Airs points for each action
s2.description: Perform positive impact actions and earn Airs points for each verified action.
s2.title: Generate impact

s3.b1: Your RBI is calculated based on your Airs
s3.description: As your Airs grows, your Regenerative Basic Income increases automatically.
s3.title: Receive your RBI

s4.description: Use your ATN and RBI tokens to access products, services and projects in the ecosystem.
s4.title: Redeem and grow

membresia.descriptionPart1: No monthly fees or renewals needed.
membresia.descriptionPart2Bold: When you offset your first carbon footprint, you become a lifetime member.
membresia.descriptionPart3: From that moment, you start accumulating Airs and receiving your RBI monthly.
membresia.descriptionPart4: Your membership never expires and your benefits only grow over time.

eco.description: Organic and sustainable products verified by the Alternun ecosystem.
eco.title: Eco Products
eco.infoBody: Access exclusive discounts on sustainable products from our allied brands. From organic clothing to ecological cleaning products.

experiencias.description: Discover curated trips, retreats, and experiences designed to reward positive impact.
experiencias.title: Experiences
experiencias.infoBody: Discover curated trips, retreats, and nature experiences designed to reward positive impact. Each experience connects you with regenerative ecosystems around the world.

marketplace.description: Access a marketplace of regenerative products and services.
marketplace.title: Marketplace

premium.description: Unlock exclusive perks, priority access, and elevated support across the ecosystem.
premium.title: Premium
premium.infoBody: Enjoy priority access, elevated support, and exclusive perks throughout the ecosystem. Premium membership unlocks the best Alternun has to offer, including private events and personalized guidance.

cursos.description: Learn practical regenerative skills with courses, workshops, and verified guidance.
cursos.title: Courses
cursos.infoBody: Learn practical regenerative skills with expert-led courses, workshops, and verified certifications. Build knowledge that translates directly into positive impact.

services.description: Verified services that contribute to positive impact.
services.title: Services

beneficios.subtitle: Discover everything you can get with Alternun

settingsScreen.localPreferenceHelp: Stored locally in your browser/app preferences.
settingsScreen.subtitle: Manage interface preferences and account-level controls.
settingsScreen.title: Settings

walletModal.disclaimer: By connecting, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
walletModal.subtitle: Connect your wallet to access the full Ambient Impact Dashboard
walletModal.title: Connect Wallet

support.chatDescription: Start a conversation with our support team
